response:
<<Digital Ethics Rules>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust deeply.
Trust builds strong bonds.
Bonds connect people well.
People need fair tools.
Tools must be safe.
Safety protects user data.
Data belongs to owners.
Owners deserve full respect.
Respect guides every choice.
Choices shape future tech.
Tech should help all.
All users gain value.
Value comes from care.
Care prevents harm now.
Now we build right.
Right actions win trust.
Trust leads to growth.
Growth benefits society much.
Much effort goes in.
In this we believe.
Section 2
AI needs clear rules.
Rules stop bad acts.
Acts of bias hurt.
Hurt feelings cause pain.
Pain stops innovation fast.
Fast progress requires care.
Care ensures fair outcomes.
Outcomes must be just.
Just systems work well.
Well designed tools help.
Helping others is key.
Key principles guide work.
Work involves many teams.
Teams check code often.
Often we test models.
Models learn from data.
Data sources need review.
Review finds hidden flaws.
Flaws can cause harm.
Harm must be fixed.
Section 3
Privacy remains a priority.
Priority means strict control.
Control limits data access.
Access requires user consent.
Consent gives users power.
Power belongs to them.
Them we serve daily.
Daily updates keep systems.
Systems protect personal info.
Info stays secure always.
Always we encrypt files.
Files hold private details.
Details are never sold.
Sold data breaks trust.
Trust is hard won.
Won by honest deeds.
Deeds show our values.
Values drive our mission.
Mission focuses on people.
People come first always.
Section 4
Transparency helps build faith.
Faith grows with clarity.
Clarity explains how AI works.
Works of code need light.
Light shines on logic.
Logic follows clear paths.
Paths show decision points.
Points reveal hidden choices.
Choices should be known.
Known factors build confidence.
Confidence allows wider use.
Use expands when safe.
Safe environments foster learning.
Learning improves system skills.
Skills serve human needs.
Needs vary across groups.
Groups require tailored solutions.
Solutions respect cultural norms.
Norms guide ethical
